name: 72"x48" World Map Linen Wall Tapestry - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Get your walls decorated with the 72"x48" World Map Linen Wall Tapestry from Threshold™, designed with Studio McGee. Made from high-quality linen material, this tapestry features a beautifully detailed world map, perfect for adding a touch of sophistication to any room. Its large size makes it a stunning focal point, ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, or offices. Easy to hang and versatile, this tapestry is a simple way to bring a global charm to your decor. Enjoy the elegant and timeless look it offers.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
